---
format: pdf
page-layout: full
---

\thispagestyle{empty}

\begin{center}

\vspace*{2cm}

{\Huge\bfseries Manual de Microeconometría}

\vspace{1cm}

{\Large Aplicada a la Economía}

\vspace{1.5cm}

\includegraphics[width=0.7\textwidth]{cover.png}

\vspace{1.5cm}

{\Large Carlos de Anta Puig}

\vfill

{\Large DigitalReasons}

\vspace{0.5cm}

{\large 2026}

\end{center}

\newpage
